The '''''Star Wars Adventure Journal'' 10''' is the tenth issue of the role-playing magazine [[Star Wars Adventure Journal]]. It was published by [[West End Games]] in [[May]] of [[1996]] and contained several articles and short stories.

==Publisher's summary==
''Take a fascinating voyage through the'' Star Wars ''galaxy with'' The Official Star Wars Adventure Journal''. Each issue features exciting adventures, new source material and tales from the'' Star Wars ''universe! The'' Star Wars Adventure Journal ''gives'' Star Wars ''fans original locations, characters and plots in their favorite fictional universe that they cannot find anywhere else.''

''His body broken but his determination still whole, Daye Azur-Jamin struggles to serve the Rebellion, running guns to aliens fighting hard against Imperial domination that threatens their very existance. He doesn't suspect that his fiance, Tinian I'att, and her newfound mentor, the Wookiee bounty hunter Chenlambec, have targeted the aliens' charismatic leader, Agapos, as their next prey! Inspired by Agapos' truthful sayings, Daye must save the alien leader, Tinian and himself.'' Only Droids Serve the Maker ''is another'' Star wars ''adventure from'' New York Times ''bestselling author Kathy Tyers.''

'''''Other features in this issue include:'''''
*''A medic along on a commando mission must decide whether her abilities can save an Imperial prisoner, or if she can kill him to keep valuable secrets from the Empire — violating her oath to'' Do No Harm''.''
*''Visit the homeworlds of the Chadra-Fan, Gamorreans, Kubaz and Whipids in'' A Free-Trader's Guide to the Planets''.''
*Toria Tell's Droid Journal ''provides an interesting array of new droids from a servant droid to the impressive public works droid.''
*''Catch up with the latest news on events within the'' Star Wars ''universe with'' Galaxywide NewsNets.

==Contents==
*[[Cracken's Rebel Operatives (article)|''Cracken's Rebel Operatives'']] by [[Craig Robert Carey|C. Robert Carey]]
*''[[A Free-Trader's Guide to the Planets]]'' by [[Timothy S. O'Brien|Timothy O'Brien]]
*''[[Cracken's Rebel Field Guide: Slicing Aids]]'' by C. Robert Carey and [[J. P. Pietrzak|J.P. Pietrzak]]
*''[[Toria Tell's Droid Journal (article)|Toria Tell's Droid Journal]]'' by [[Christian Piccolo]]
*''[[Galaxywide NewsNets]]'' by [[Paul Sudlow]]
*''[[Alliance Intelligence Report: TIE Fighters]]'' by Timothy O'Brien
*[[Wanted by Cracken (Star Wars Adventure Journal)|''Wanted by Cracken'']] by C. Robert Carey
*''[[Only Droids Serve the Maker]]'' by [[Kathy Tyers]]
*''[[Do No Harm]]'' by [[Erin Endom]]
*''[[The Capture of Imperial Hazard]]'' by [[Nora Mayers]]
*''[[Desperate Measures]]'' by [[Carolyn Golledge]]
